hero.title: Less counting matters
hero.description: DiabCam is an intelligent AI meal scanner that relieves you from tedious data entry. Just take a photo, and our technology does the rest.

features.aiDesc: Our advanced model recognizes ingredients, estimates weight, and detects hidden calories in sauces and oils.
features.voiceDesc: Don't want to take a photo? Just tell DiabCam what you ate, and the AI will handle the calculations.

diets.diabeticDesc: Automatic calculation of WW, WBT, GI, and GL. Generate professional PDF reports for your doctor.
diets.ketoDesc: Precise tracking of net carbs and fat ratios essential in a ketogenic diet.
diets.fitnessDesc: Monitor macronutrients and calories without the need to manually weigh every product.

stats.title: Diary & Statistics
stats.desc: Clear calendar, meal history, and interactive progress charts at your fingertips.
stats.sync: Your data is safe and always synchronized in the cloud.
